mapper.select: select c.id, c.comment_content as commentContent, c.comment_status as commentStatus, c.created_date as createdDate, c.updated_date as updatedDate, c.comment_board_id as commentBoardId, c.comment_member_id as commentMemberId, coalesce( nullif(nullif(m.member_nickname, ''), '닉네임을입력해주세요.'), m.member_name, concat('회원#', c.comment_member_id) ) as memberNickname from tbl_comment c left join tbl_member m on c.comment_member_id = m.id where c.comment_board_id = #{boardId} and c.comment_status = 'active' order by c.id desc

select c.id, c.comment_content as commentContent, c.comment_status as commentStatus, c.created_date as createdDate, c.updated_date as updatedDate, c.comment_board_id as commentBoardId, c.comment_member_id as commentMemberId, coalesce( nullif(nullif(m.member_nickname, ''), '닉네임을입력해주세요.'), m.member_name, concat('회원#', c.comment_member_id) ) as memberNickname from tbl_comment c left join tbl_member m on c.comment_member_id = m.id where c.id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update tbl_comment set comment_content = #{commentContent}, updated_date = current_timestamp() where id = #{id} and comment_status = 'active'
